ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the survey was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses received for the survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the survey */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the country entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the country entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the country entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the country entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the response belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the response belongs to */,
  "happiness_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country's happiness */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Score of the country's happiness */,
  "economy" REAL /* Economy score */,
  "health" REAL /* Health score */,
  "freedom" REAL /* Freedom score */,
  "trust" REAL /* Trust score */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent who provided the response */,
  "respondent_age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "respondent_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "respondent_education" TEXT /* Education level of the respondent */,
  "respondent_income" TEXT /* Income level of the respondent */,
  "respondent_employment" TEXT /* Employment status of the respondent */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the response */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the response */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, rating scale) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the question (e.g., economy, health, freedom) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the question (e.g., GDP, healthcare quality) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the question was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the question */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_responses" (
  "question_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question response */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response the question response belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response is for */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the question */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question response */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the question response was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the question response */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the question response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_responses_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the response */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the region entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the region entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the region entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the region entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_regions" (
  "country_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-region relationship */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the country-region relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the country-region relationship was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the country-region relationship */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the country-region relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "survey_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey-question relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey-question relationship was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the survey-question relationship */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey-question relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
